[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Heodak Chicken X Isaac Toast]
[A special collaboration]
[Heodak Carbonara]
[10 toasts from Heodak X Isaac]
[Comfortable]
[Can we stop eating?]
[Nope]
[I've reached my limit]
[Still plenty of room]
[Life is hard]
[I'm finished]
Hello everyone
I'm here in front of Isaac Toast today
Isaac Toast and comedian Heo Kyung Hwan's Heodak are doing a collaboration
Here's our sponsor

Hello
We'll be meeting him in person soon
I'm excited
Let's start off with Heodak Carbonara Toast,
Bacon Potato Pizza,
Deep Cheese Bacon Potato,
Licham (spam)
Is 10 going to be enough?
[Let's run away]
[What is this delicious smell]?
[It's their special sauce!]
[And today's highlight!]
[The toasts are ready!]
Ta-da!
Here we have 10 toasts
Where do I begin?

This is the Heodak carbonara which is the new collab menu with Isaac Toast and Heodak Chicken
Let's save this for later so we can eat it with him
Let's start with this one
Honey garlic ham cheese
It's pretty thick
I used to eat at Isaac Toast all the time as a kid, especially the ham & cheese
The bread is really crispy Really tasty
It's ham & cheese inside
A bit sweeter
The bread is really delicious
I love this sweet sauce
[We made it!]
It gets better towards the middle
I used to eat here every day as a student
[Hey, me too!]
Sauce

You know that garlic bread taste? I can taste that
The sauce even looks like garlic bread
[Golden honey garlic sauce]
The sauce is really yummy
There's no Isaac Toast near my house
Can we get 1 near my house?
[Dear Isaac Toast, please open one near Tzuyang's home]
Heodak was just about to come inside
Hello, Where's the camera
[I'm the owner!]
Hello Tzuyang
Hello CEO,
CEO? No
May I sit? Yes
How many is this?
Is it 10? Yes it is

I ate 1 though
I always watch you on YouTube
You're skinny in the videos and even skinnier in person
Really? Thank you
You're more handsome in person
I'm better in person
The cameras can't handle it Right...
Why can't they improve?
What's that?
This.. It may seem like I'm here to sell something...
It's our company's best-selling items
It's about 2 weeks worth of food for normal people
But I think you will go through it in a day
Is that all for me?
Of course Really?
Just eat some in front of the camera

[Okay, in a bit]
[Shall we get started?]
Really good looking
This is a first for me
Really I don't know what to expect
Hello, I'm Heo Kyung Hwan, representative of Heodak Chicken Breast
[Not paid actors]
You have a lot of subscribers
I'm jealous
Come visit Heo Kyung Hwan's Good-looking Golf TV
If anyone's interested in golf
Isaac Toast and Heodak did a collaboration
And came out with a very delicious Carbonara Toast
I haven't tried it yet Is it good?
It will blow your mind
And most importantly packed with protein

So tasty even considering the healthy nutritional facts
But is it just 1? Wait a minute,
Excuse me?
[You mean us?]
They came up like moles
Can we get 1 more Carbonara Toast on my bill?
[Gotcha]
[While we wait...]
You're such a good eater
[Isaac Toast's Special Sauce]
[All over]
[Mozzarella cheese, eggs, and bacon]
[100% domestic Heodak's chicken breast]
[With flavorful carbonara sauce]
Here it is
Thank you

How is it? I get messages every day about it
Tell me about people's reactions
500 Won if you're curious (his famous comedy line)
Okay I'll show you
Are you curious? If you are, give me 500 Won! Just like that
I'll ask you the question
Is Heodak Carbo popular?
Are you curious if it sells well?
I'm sorry!
I'm nervous
1 more time
[Here's 500 Won]
[This is it]
She must've prepared for this
And forgot it on the way here
Is Heodak Carbo popular?

If you're curious, give me 500 Won!
Here's 500 Won
People that try this always come back to order it again
Really? Yes
If you take a look at the inside, It's like cheese
That looks good
Bacon and chicken breast That's a lot of chicken
I want to give you a milkshake
But the grinder will be quite loud
'The noise is what makes it tasty' do that (also his famous line)
Is it loud..?
The noise is what...
I'm sorry!
[I can't do it]
I feel like she will go home if I ask her to do more
It's okay

[Might just quit on the spot]
I thought she prepared that too
[Let's start the mukbang]
Amazing
It can get a little messy
It doesn't feel like chicken breast
Bacon is also very soft
Do you lose subscribers if you make a mess?
This shouldn't be coming out of my own mouth, but
It's tasty
Yes it is
I should say it
I'm really shocked that it doesn't feel like chicken breast
And the sauce is really good Chicken is tender
Isaac Toast in general has tasty and sweet sandwiches
The mix of that and carbonara

Go well together
It's surprising how tender chicken breast can be
I didn't eat anything the whole day for this mukbang Really?
And it really hits the spot
It's really delicious
That texture too What do you think?
Honestly,
I was worried that I wouldn't enjoy it because I don't like chicken breast
But I think this tastes even better than bulgogi
[Satisfied]
Our new item Heodak Carbonara Toast goes really well with this milkshake
They really go well together
[Looking for cons]
It's hard to eat because it's too big
I found a con
It's pretty thick because of the chicken breast

It will fill you up You will be surprised to see it
It's end-game if you eat it with this milkshake
I noticed that the bread tastes different Is it a special type of bread?
That's crazy
You're really talented
This is the rye malt(?) bread
Just to make sure that you're eating healthy
It's barley
Is it?
Let's try that again
[Get it right!]
Barley, Made with barley
Its got a soft taste
I knew it from the first bite
It's great with Isaac sauce and the carbonara sauce
Chicken meat is very tender too

I loved the chicken
Well then...
Here we have some chicken
Do you like spicy? Yes I do
I will use some of these
to cook you something Thank you
3 sausages in here
Sausage Triple
This comes with lettuce, but I asked them not to put it in
So it's just sausages
Looks so good Bon appetit
Very juicy and smokey
Tasty sausage
It's juicy Take a look
That juice
[Is it good?]

Oh, yeah Eat up!
[If you say so]
As I'm watching you eat
I'm imagining if my girlfriend ordered that much...
Do you think you will break up?
I would need to work hard!
"Oppa, I ordered 10, Now, order yours"
[Is that my future?]
[Heodak items are coming together]
[Cooked in the microwave and still delicious]
[Chicken breast that's completely filled]
[Some Heodak sauce on top]
Amazing
It's something that I personally like
Looks good
It's shirataki tofu, but looks just like rice

I don't see it at all
That's cool
It won't look like rice if you can see it
It doesn't taste like shirataki tofu at all!
Really tasty
I'm pretty sensitive to the seasoning on fried rice
I think most people will enjoy this dish
Except for the people that are not good with spicy food It's pretty spicy
It's spicy, but its got strong flavors And people crave that
It's addicting
If you cooked this on a frying pan, press it down cook the bottom to a crisp
'Heodak' is not showing because of the apron
How's that?
How about this?
That's a little weird
It's completely filled

You're telling me this is chicken breast?! Yes
No it's not!
Is it really chicken breast?
That's why people love Heodak
[So confident]
Just like how people love Isaac Toast
Filled with sweet potato
Amazing
Take a look at that
Yummm
No way
It just melts when I chew How's this chicken breast?
That was great
I needed an advertising model
I like that
I think it's really tasty

Perfectly seasoned
[She just keeps eating...]
She cleared it It's so good
Chicken breast
I want to try other flavors now I'm curious
You don't have to do that for a show
No, really It's so good
Let's be honest now!
Tzuyang!
I'll bring a couple more then
[Heodak's popular items]
But this..
[Improvise]
You're standing them up like this?
Gotta improvise
These are what people love eating when they're on a diet

This sweet potato chicken breast is what you just had
Full of protein as a healthy meal
I'm curious Can I try this?
Of course
I'll prepare this for you
You continue eating
Bagel! Looks good
Bacon cheese bagel
This is good too
The taste of the bread is really deep
It's definitely...
You know that bagel flavor
I'm not good at this
[Chewy bagel is their hidden popular menu item]
Yummy
The bottom is crispy like a chip

[Some milkshake]
Here you are
[Kyung Hwan's Chicken Breast Salad]
The chicken breast is not dry...
I can't talk today
You're making it look dry
Talk more smoothly, please
That looked dry
It's not right for me to eat just 1 sandwich on Tzuyang's channel
So I'll do 1 more Which though?
Shrimp Shrimp?
You can use this
Amazing
I can see the shrimp
I don't think I can finish 2
You don't need to eat a lot

Bulgogi Galbi Toast
This also comes with lettuce, but I asked them for no lettuce
The sauce is really not like bulgogi sauce It's unique
That's why it's bulgogi+galbi
[Where are you going?]
[Drained]
This is it for me I'm done
Go without me
I can't take care of you anymore
I'm finished
Last one!
[Astonished]
I'm a fan
Here we have...
Licham (spam)
Cool, right?

She ate 10 burgers last time too
10 burgers?!
This spam is tasty
Right, Licham
If the people didn't eat Isaac Toast recently,
People might think that I'm over-reacting after eating 2
Try it for yourselves
I think it's thicker than their burgers Right
Last!
Finally,
Clap!
[Moles]
[Workers changed?]
That's amazing
Thank you for the applause
I had the Heodak Carbonara Toast today

There's a misconception that all chicken breasts are dry
I've been introduced to something new today
That's enough
The sauce was great too
It's delicious but healthy!
These chicken chunks were great too
Thank you for today
I had a great meal thanks to you
Your content is important too, but always look out for your health
Continue bringing us delicious and healthy mukbang shows
Thank you for having me today
Thanks everyone~ [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
